zh.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古
zh.Montacute, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特蒙塔庫特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Montague於大約1160年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古時，他的父親Richard Montagu44歲，母親Alice de Basset32歲。他於1179年與Isabel of Somerset在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年6月之前在英國薩默塞特蒙塔庫特，埋葬在英國薩默塞特蒙塔庫特。

zh-hans.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古
zh-hans.Montacute, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特蒙塔庫特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Montague于大约1160年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古时，他的父亲Richard Montagu44岁，母亲Alice de Basset32岁。他于1179年与Isabel of Somerset在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1217年6月之前在英国薩默塞特蒙塔庫特，埋葬在英国薩默塞特蒙塔庫特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montague
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: McTigue
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Taidhg, ‘son of Tadhg’, a personal name originally meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’. Compare McCaig .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Montague was born about 1160, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, his father, Richard Montagu, was 44 and his mother, Alice de Basset, was 32. He married Isabel of Somerset in 1179, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died before June 1217, in Montacute, Somerset, England, and was buried in Montacute, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Montague est né environ 1160, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Richard Montagu, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice de Basset, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isabel of Somerset en 1179, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant juin 1217, à Montacute, Somerset, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Montacute, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Montague um 1160 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Montagu 44 und seine Mutter Alice de Basset 32. Er hat 1179 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England Isabel of Somerset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor Juni 1217 in Montacute, Somerset, England und wurde in Montacute, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Montague è nato il circa 1160 nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Richard Montagu, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Basset, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Isabel of Somerset nel 1179, nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del giugno 1217, nel Montacute, Somerset, England, e fu sepolto a Montacute, Somerset, England.

ja.Bruton, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトブルトン
ja.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグー
ja.Montacute, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトモンタクウト
ja.lifeSummary: William de Montagueが約1160年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーで生まれた時，父Richard Montaguは44歳，母Alice de Bassetは32歳であった。1179年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーでIsabel of Somersetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年6月以前にイギリスソメルセトモンタクウトで死去し，イギリスソメルセトモンタクウトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Montague(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Montagu(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Basset(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1179년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 Isabel of Somerset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 6월 이전 영국 서머세트 몽악트에서 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 몽악트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Montague nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Montagu, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Basset, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel of Somerset em 1179, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes junho de 1217, em Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Montague родился около 1160 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Montagu было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Basset, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel of Somerset в 1179 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер перед июнь 1217 г. в местности монтакут, сомирсет, Англия и был похоронен в местности монтакут, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Montague nació aproximadamente 1160, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Montagu, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice de Basset, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Isabel of Somerset en 1179, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió antes de junio de 1217, en Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra.
